bird.name: Red-throated bee-eater
bird.summary: The red-throated bee-eater (Merops bulocki) is a species of bird in the family Meropidae. This species is native to the Sudan (region).

relations.subject: Red-throated bee-eater
relations.evidence: Its typical habitat is savannah with scattered trees, farmland with trees, the edges of marshes, bushy pastures and gardens, but the birds are rarely to be found far from the erosion gullies, streams and small rivers, in the banks of which they nest. thumb|Ground nests of red-throated bee-eaters next to a stream in Yankari National Park, Bauchi, Nigeria
relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。
